global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on the brand and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to claim a reward for booking flights.

elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad, prominently displaying the brand name 'HorizonHop UGC' in a modern font.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Medium-sized text in the center that reads 'Fly smarter Flexible booking options' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text '€9.99 Claim reward' in a contrasting color, designed to attract attention.
